title: Author retroactive-packetization workflow-series and (if needed) runtime workflow.json binding
description: Workstream-template + index.md now landed at substrate/collectives/wrkstrm/.../kura-spaces/spaces/workstreams/collections/retroactive-packetization/ (2026-05-31). Doctrine-level extraction is complete; this bead is downgraded to cover the next-layer-down: (a) author retroactive-packetization.workflow-series.json under kura-spaces/series/workflows/retroactive-packetization/ if the workstream's task sequence needs to be a typed series rather than just an inline tasks[] array; (b) if the substrate ever needs to runtime-bind retroactive-packetization to a specific session (operator + agent + binding profile), author the heavy workflow.json instance at substrate/workflows/v0.1.0/ following the existing 20-field shape. Both (a) and (b) are deferrable until a real need arises — the workstream-template + axiom are sufficient for the current substrate-doctrine layer. Pairs with [[bead:library-extraction-for-testability-typed-workflow]].
